questions.question_text:
Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
Too much discipline can become inhibitive to the point that creative energy does not find any outlet. It cannot be denied that discipline is of utmost importance in school. Unfortunately, discipline enforced blindly often (a) ________ more harm than good. For example, we should be (b) ________ quiet during assembly so that we can hear what is being said.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
Passenger airplanes mostly fly at speeds less than that sound. Airplanes that can fly at greater speeds have been built. This is (a) ________ if they fly at speeds greater (b) ________ the speed of sound, the fuel consumption increases enormously.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
While interviewing children (a) ________ were candidates for a special program, one of the questions asked was what life would be (b) ________ 100 years hence.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
I took the sack of cornmeal and carried it to where the canoe was hidden and pushed the vines and branches apart I took a bucket from the canoe. I filled it (a) ________ water and kept it under a tree. Then I pulled out (b) ________ fish lines. There were two fish which had taken that bait.

Complete the sentence given below with the help of options that follow:
Once upon a time, there was a man called Smith. He was a greengrocer (a) ________ lived in Clapham. He had four sons, The eldest was called George after the king and it was arranged that he was (b) ________ inherit his father's shop. So after school, he went to special Botany classes.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
They often go fishing ________ going to school.
Stella often goes to the movies ________ telling her parents.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
Everybody (a) ________ born as one single individual, but by the time he is mature enough (b) ________ participate in life, he has become a crowd. This is almost the case with everybody.

Complete the sentence given below with the help of options that follow:
I (a) ________ the sack of corn meal and (b) ________ it to where the canoe was hidden and pushed the vines and branches apart I took a bucket from the canoe.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
I have always ________ play games well.
He has always ________ to do what he wanted.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
Everybody is born as one single individual, but by the time he is mature enough to participate in life, he has become a crowd. This is almost the case with everybody. Become aware of (a) ________. If you just sit silently and listen to your mind, you (b) ________ find so many voices. You will be surprised, you can recognise those voices very well.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
Sadao had taken this into his mind as his father said, who never joked (a) ________ played with him but who spent infinite pains (b) ________ him who was his only son. Actually, he loved his son with all his heart.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
When the old lady returned to her flat she saw at once that the burglars had broken in her absence. Though the burglars themselves were no longer there she saw at once that they (a) ________ because there was a burning cigarette in the ashtray. Probably they (b) ________ the lift coming up and had run down the stairs.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
On May 20, 1818, the British explorer Sir Stamford Raffles, reported the finding of a giant flower in Sumatra. It was named Rafflesia after him. Measuring almost a metre across and weighing up to eleven kilograms, the Rafflesia is the world's largest flower. It is also called 'Stinking Lily' (a) ________ of the unpleasant smell it emits. The people who have been fortunate to see it, inform that they were overcome (b) ________ its beauty.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
One cannot help but ________ his courage.
I will have tea ________ coffee.

Complete the sentence/s given below with the help of options that follow:
Our city was acutely short of water. In one of my classes, I stressed upon the need to conserve water. We discussed ways of harvesting rainwater and making the discussion of every drop that was available, I was surprised to hear wise thoughts expressed by an 11-year-old boy. He told us that (a) ________ he washed his face in the morning he didn't throw the water (b) ________. He caught it in a bowl and placed it for the birds.

rock. It is made / particles of sand

in New Delhi is / of sandstone.
